title: More Nonsense Limerick 80
content:
There was an old person of Bow,
    Whom nobody happened to know;
    So they gave him some soap, 
    And said coldly, "We hope
    You will go back directly to Bow!"
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 80" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
